code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[users,setUsers]=useState([]);const[username,setUsername]=useState('');const[email,setEmail]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{fetchUsers();},[]);const fetchUsers=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch('http://localhost:8080/api/users');const data=await response.json();setUsers(data);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching users:',error);}};const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{await fetch('http://localhost:8080/api/users',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({username,email})});setUsername('');setEmail('');fetchUsers();}catch(error){console.error('Error saving user:',error);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:'20px',maxWidth:'600px',margin:'0 auto'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"User Management"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,style:{marginBottom:'30px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{marginBottom:'10px'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Username",value:username,onChange:e=>setUsername(e.target.value),required:true,style:{padding:'8px',marginRight:'10px',width:'200px'}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{marginBottom:'10px'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",placeholder:"Email",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value),required:true,style:{padding:'8px',marginRight:'10px',width:'200px'}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",style:{padding:'8px 16px',backgroundColor:'#007bff',color:'white',border:'none',cursor:'pointer'},children:"Save"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Users List"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:users.map((user,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:'10px',border:'1px solid #ddd',marginBottom:'5px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:user.username})," - ",user.email]},index))})]});}export default App;
